posts.raw_content:
From today's EPOCH TIMES...

TRINIDAD, Texas (pop. 800) —The police chief has resigned, a municipal judge has been ousted, city workers have been fired, and lawsuits are piling up - after **police arrested a local woman on felony charges over a Facebook post** questioning the safety of the town’s tap water.

‘A Tornado of Craziness’

Jailed for 23 hours without bond.  

Trinidad Police Chief Charles Gregory doubled down on his assertion that Combs **broke the law by “spreading false information” on Facebook.**

(only on the Right, of course - NEVER on the LEFT) 

“We have plenty of evidence that this was all a concerted effort to silence my client for uncovering and talking about the water problems there that they were trying to cover up.”

Combs did not fabricate an emergency or summon emergency responders or trigger evacuations, the lawsuit states. It further alleges that Combs’s arrest was an act of “deliberate political retaliation.”

more -  /Subscription needed/ 

https://www.theepochtimes.com/
posts.author: Bullet3250
posts.title: A small Texas town has been turned upside down after a woman was arrested over her comments on the town’s water quality...
posts.content:
From today's EPOCH TIMES...

TRINIDAD, Texas (pop. 800) —The police chief has resigned, a municipal judge has been ousted, city workers have been fired, and lawsuits are piling up - after police arrested a local woman on felony charges over a Facebook post questioning the safety of the town’s tap water.

‘A Tornado of Craziness’

Jailed for 23 hours without bond.

Trinidad Police Chief Charles Gregory doubled down on his assertion that Combs broke the law by “spreading false information” on Facebook.

(only on the Right, of course - NEVER on the LEFT)

“We have plenty of evidence that this was all a concerted effort to silence my client for uncovering and talking about the water problems there that they were trying to cover up.”

Combs did not fabricate an emergency or summon emergency responders or trigger evacuations, the lawsuit states. It further alleges that Combs’s arrest was an act of “deliberate political retaliation.”

posts.author: crowsfury
posts.title: Free Beacon: Michigan Dem Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed’s Father-in-Law, a Top Donor to an El-Sayed Super PAC, Is Among Top Leaders of Muslim Brotherhood Organization Linked to Terror Funding

link_metadata.description: Abdul El-Sayed's father-in-law, a top donor to a super PAC supporting the left-wing Michigan Senate hopeful, is among the top leaders of an Islamic organization identified by the federal government as a front group for the Muslim Brotherhood, a Washington Free Beacon review found. As part of his role with the Islamic Society of North America (ISNA), which the federal government linked to the financing of Hamas, Tayeb Jukaku contributes at least $5,000 to the organization annually.
link_metadata.title: Abdul El-Sayed’s Father-in-Law, a Top Donor to an El-Sayed Super PAC, Is Among Top Leaders of Muslim Brotherhood Organization Linked to Terror Funding
